issues.title: README too short
issues.why_it_matters: The project context is too weak to explain value, scope, or usage.
issues.recommendation: Expand the README with purpose, setup, usage, and project structure.

issues.title: Project description missing in README
issues.why_it_matters: Readers may not understand what the repository actually does.
issues.recommendation: Add a clear overview section explaining the project goal and scope.

issues.title: Installation instructions missing
issues.why_it_matters: The project is harder to reproduce and use.
issues.recommendation: Add installation or setup steps to the README.

issues.title: Usage instructions missing
issues.why_it_matters: The repository is difficult to run or evaluate.
issues.recommendation: Document how to run the project and provide example commands.

issues.title: Project structure not explained
issues.why_it_matters: The repository layout is less understandable for maintainers and recruiters.
issues.recommendation: Add a short section describing key folders and modules.

issues.title: No demo or examples detected
issues.why_it_matters: The project is less convincing and harder to evaluate quickly.
issues.recommendation: Add screenshots, example outputs, or a demo section.

issues.title: No roadmap or limitations section detected
issues.why_it_matters: The project maturity and future direction are unclear.
issues.recommendation: Add roadmap, known limitations, or next steps.

issues.title: Main code directory missing
issues.why_it_matters: The codebase appears less structured and harder to scale.
issues.recommendation: Move main source code into a dedicated folder such as src/, app/, or lib/.

issues.title: Tests directory missing
issues.why_it_matters: Test organization is unclear or absent.
issues.recommendation: Add a dedicated tests/ directory.

issues.title: Supporting directories missing
issues.why_it_matters: The repository may lack separation for docs, assets, data, or scripts.
issues.recommendation: Add relevant directories such as docs/, assets/, data/, or scripts/ when needed.

issues.title: Inconsistent or vague naming
issues.why_it_matters: Weak file naming hurts readability and maintainability.
issues.recommendation: Rename vague files and enforce consistent naming conventions.

issues.title: Dependency manifest missing
issues.why_it_matters: Dependencies are not formalized, which harms reproducibility.
issues.recommendation: Add an appropriate dependency manifest such as pyproject.toml or package.json.

issues.title: .gitignore missing
issues.why_it_matters: Generated files are more likely to be committed accidentally.
issues.recommendation: Add a proper .gitignore file for the project stack.

issues.title: License missing
issues.why_it_matters: The repository usage rights are unclear.
issues.recommendation: Add a LICENSE file.

issues.title: Tooling configuration missing
issues.why_it_matters: Formatting, linting, or testing standards are less explicit.
issues.recommendation: Add configuration for core tools such as pytest, ruff, eslint, or tsconfig.

issues.title: Environment example missing
issues.why_it_matters: Projects using configuration or secrets are harder to reproduce safely.
issues.recommendation: Add a .env.example or equivalent configuration template.

issues.title: No tests detected
issues.why_it_matters: The project appears fragile and less maintainable.
issues.recommendation: Add a basic test suite covering core logic and critical flows.

issues.title: Test presence appears weak
issues.why_it_matters: A very small number of tests often indicates fragile coverage.
issues.recommendation: Increase the breadth of tests for critical paths.

issues.title: Test framework not clearly configured
issues.why_it_matters: The testing strategy is less explicit and reproducible.
issues.recommendation: Declare and configure the testing framework clearly.

issues.title: CI for tests missing
issues.why_it_matters: Quality checks are not automatically enforced.
issues.recommendation: Add CI workflows to run tests automatically.

issues.title: Oversized files detected
issues.why_it_matters: Very large files often indicate weak modularity and harder maintenance.
issues.recommendation: Split large files into smaller focused modules.

issues.title: Monolithic structure detected
issues.why_it_matters: Too much logic concentrated in too few files hurts scalability.
issues.recommendation: Separate the codebase into clearer modules and responsibilities.

issues.title: Vague file names detected
issues.why_it_matters: Generic names reduce readability and professionalism.
issues.recommendation: Rename files to reflect their specific responsibility.

issues.title: Poor separation of concerns
issues.why_it_matters: Responsibilities appear mixed, which makes future changes harder.
issues.recommendation: Split logic into dedicated layers or modules.

issues.title: Technical documentation missing
issues.why_it_matters: Architecture and maintainability decisions are harder to understand.
issues.recommendation: Add technical docs such as architecture notes or contribution guidelines.

issues.title: Repository description missing
issues.why_it_matters: The repo is less understandable at first glance on GitHub.
issues.recommendation: Add a concise GitHub repository description.

issues.title: Repository appears stale
issues.why_it_matters: An old untouched repository may look abandoned.
issues.recommendation: Update the project, refresh documentation, or mark it as archived if appropriate.

issues.title: Repository is empty or nearly empty
issues.why_it_matters: The project does not currently demonstrate meaningful value.
issues.recommendation: Add actual implementation, documentation, or archive/remove the repo.

issues.title: Demo artifacts missing
issues.why_it_matters: The project is harder to evaluate quickly as a portfolio item.
issues.recommendation: Add screenshots, sample outputs, or a live demo link.

issues.title: Project promise is weakly supported by repository contents
issues.why_it_matters: The repo may look incomplete or under-delivered compared to its description.
issues.recommendation: Align README, structure, and code to match the stated project scope.

issues.title: Low portfolio clarity
issues.why_it_matters: The project is not immediately understandable to a recruiter or reviewer.
issues.recommendation: Clarify the purpose, impact, and usage of the project.

issues.title: Low technical credibility
issues.why_it_matters: The repository lacks signals of engineering maturity.
issues.recommendation: Improve structure, documentation, testing, and tooling signals.

issues.title: Hard to present in interview
issues.why_it_matters: The project lacks quick evidence of output, value, or usability.
issues.recommendation: Add examples, demo material, and clearer execution instructions.

prioritized_actions.title: Document installation steps

prioritized_actions.title: Complete or archive the repository

Either add real implementation or archive/remove it from showcase use.
